title: Welcome Back
description: Sign in to enter the Cocoon-SIT workspace and continue configuring characters, models, and nested cocoon conversations.
registerDescription: Register with an invite code and enter the Cocoon-SIT workspace right away.
error: Sign in failed. Please check your username and password.
registerError: Registration failed. Please verify the invite code and your input.
adminHint: The default admin account comes from the backend .env configuration.
registerHint: Registration requires an invite code and a password with at least 8 characters.
registerInviteHint: Successful registration creates the invite-tree relationship and signs you in immediately.
